title: History view: cannot zoom into video (image zoom works)
description: In the group-history workspace, a VIDEO entry cannot be zoomed in (the zoom/scale interaction that works for images does not work for video). Reproduced on BOTH platforms during the 2026-06-10 rentamac M4 test AND on Linux 0.0.7/0.0.8 — so it is platform-agnostic, a real component bug in the video viewer path, not a packaging/case issue. Image zoom in history works fine; only video zoom is broken. Likely in MpiVideoViewer (Organisms/MpiVideoViewer) vs MpiCanvasViewer — the canvas/image viewer has a working zoom/crop transform; the video viewer may be missing the same zoom handling or its zoom is wired only for the image path. Investigate: how MpiGroupHistoryBlock mounts the centre viewer (MpiVideoViewer for video, MpiCanvasViewer for image, see ~line 229) and whether zoom controls/gestures are bound for the video viewer. Queued for after the Mac launch/update acceptance test (MPI-8). NOT a 1.0.0 blocker per Fabio, but a polish fix.
